title: Codeset-vibing evidence
description: Evidence produced by the codeset leg: a manifest of the artifacts produced by `python -m codeset .`, plus the GitHub run id whose `mm-tree-codeset` artifact holds the actual files.

run_id.description: GitHub Actions run id of the leg run; the combine hook downloads its `mm-tree-codeset` artifact.

files.description: Manifest of files uploaded in the mm-tree artifact (paths relative to the tree root).
